events.title: Funk N Ting: DJ Mike Blenda & DJ Shafiq
Hot Dog Party 20: Young & Sick w/Cannibal Kids/more
events.description: Ybor City venue Crowbar is reserving two whole nights for its last “Hot Dog Party” ever. Leading the charge on day one is Young & Sick, the brainchild of Nick van Hofwegen who’s touring behind Alright, a 2025 collection of almost-yachty pop-rock. Other bands on the bill include Florida indie-rock darling Cannibal Kids, along with hometown heroes like songwriter Geri X, lupine punk band Wolf-Face, and “The freakiest boi band of Tampa” Bad Cameo. Jeremy Gloff, aka the Doggfather and creator of the Hot Dog Party theme song, rounds out the bill alongside DJ and producer Wally Rios. A rep… (813) 241-8600

events.title: 'What the Constitution Means to Me'
events.description: The Pulitzer-nominated work includes quotes from late U.S. Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, who also attended a performance in 2019. The Pulitzer board described the work by Heidi Schreck as “A charming and incisive analysis of gender and racial biases inherent to the U.S. Constitution that examines how this living document could evolve to fit modern America.” The play—timed with America’s 250th birthday—opens on June 26 and runs select nights and days through July 6. The approximately 90-minute play centers around Schreck's partially autobiographical account of earning college tuition through winning debate competitions on the constitution. (727)340-2866

events.title: Music Night with Nick Ewing
events.description: A live music night at Imagine Museum featuring Nick Ewing, set inside a contemporary glass art space in St. Petersburg. Event Highlights: 🎶 Live music performance by Nick Ewing 🏛️ Experience music inside Imagine Museum surrounded by contemporary glass art 🥂 Drinks available for purchase throughout the evening 🌆 Relaxed museum setting designed for an easygoing night out Event Details: 📅 Date: July 3rd, 2026 ⏰ Time: 5:00 PM – 7:30 PM 📍 Location: Imagine Museum 🎟️ Admission: $15 General Admission | $5 IM Members Experience: Nick Ewing brings a live music experience shaped by collaboration, exploration, and connection through 7273001700

events.title: 7/3 Double Play at 1983 Tampa
events.description: Join us July 3rd from 5pm-8pm at 1983 for Double Play Days — a family-friendly happy hour experience designed for fun both inside the game room and out on the turf. Throughout the month, guests can enjoy an energetic atmosphere filled with interactive games, kid-friendly activities, great food, and entertainment perfect for all ages. Parents can unwind while kids explore the arcade, challenge friends on the turf, and enjoy a rotating lineup of games and themed experiences that make every visit feel new. 8132513130

events.title: He Kindly with Giorgi, Lesa Silvermore, and Cozy In The Black
events.description: Goodie Two Shows & Oscura Presents: He Kindly, Giorgi, Lesa Silvermore, Cozy In The Black 7 PM Doors; 7:30 PM Show 21+ - Free “Pay What You Want” Under 21 - $10 He Kindly is a Tampa, FL band that blends ambient softness with post-hardcore/shoegaze intensity, moving between fragile calm and overwhelming release. Their music is combines cathartic quiet passages that ache, heavy moments that rupture, and emotion left unfiltered in between. It’s a space where vulnerability and aggression coexist, offering relief through confrontation rather than escape. He Kindly is Isaiah (vocals), Tyler (bass), Sydney (guitar), Riley (guitar), Jose (drums). 9412014950

events.title: GÜD Essence: Puff & Paint Creative Workshop
events.description: Puff and Paint is a creative social experience where guests can unwind, express themselves, and enjoy an evening of guided painting. All art supplies are provided, and participants are led step-by-step to create their own canvas artwork – no experience required. This event is a BYOW (Bring Your Own Wellness) format, with air filtration in the greenroom to maintain a comfortable atmosphere. 954.723.9350

events.title: ONE BY ONE (12X12 ART EXHIBIT)
events.description: A TOTAL OF 144 ART WORKS ( ALL SIZED 12X12) BY 72 DIFFERENT ARTISTS WILL BE ON DISPLAY AT FLORIDARAMA INSIDE THE FACTORY, ST. PETE. THE EXHIBIT WILL OPEN WITH A RECEPTION ON 7/3/25 FROM 7-10 PM. ART WILL REMAIN UP THROUGHOUT JULY. THERE WILL ALSO BE AN INTERACTIVE ARTIST PANEL ON 7/18/26 AT 7 PM. THIS WILL BE A WIDE RANGE OF MEDIUMS AND PRACTICES ALL WORKING WITHIN THE SIZE OF 12X12. DRINKS & SNACKS AVAILABLE FOR PURCHASE AT THE OPENING. COME MEET THE ARTISTS! FOLLOW FLORIDARAMA ON SOCIALS & @MOCHA_LUKE ON INSTAGRAM FOR IMAGES AND UPDATES 7272105450

events.title: Nauti Girl
events.description: The areas Premier rock band! Performing chart toping rock hits from the 90's and more! 941-251-3930

events.title: Mave's Arcade with Slow Wizard, Scattered Applause, and Giant Sloth
events.description: Mave's Arcade brings their piano-driven indie rock to the Potion Portal in St. Pete on Friday, July 3. Supported by Giant Sloth providing ambient doomscapes and Scattered Applause with a noisy take on American primitivism. The whole thing starts with Slow Wizard, who creates ambient downtempo from a myriad of tiny boxes. Free show. 7285922658

events.title: Sensory Saturday | Hands-On with Curious Creations Co.
events.description: Families with children with sensory sensitivities are invited to explore the galleries during our Sensory Saturday. During this time, all rotating audio components will be turned down or muted to ensure a calm environment. Also, join our Sensory Saturday Hands-On program for activities. Explore and experiment with non-toxic, sensory-friendly materials in the Membership Garden. All ages are welcome, though activities are generally geared towards ages 2-10. Sensory Saturdays occur on the first Saturday of every month. 7278962667

events.title: Official July 4th Bar Crawl St. Petersburg Independence Day Bar Crawl LIVE!
events.description: Official July 4th Bar Crawl St. Petersburg Independence Day Bar Crawl LIVE! St. Pete Independence Day Weekend Bar Crawl 2026 Get ready to party and celebrate Independence Day in St. Petersburg with patriotic vibes, festive drinks, and access to the city's top-rated bars and nightlife hotspots. Whether you're a local or visiting for the Fourth, this is the #1 St. Pete July 4th Bar Crawl you don't want to miss. Category: Community | Bars / Pubs Venue details: Thirsty First, 515 Central Avenue, St. Petersburg, Florida, 33701, United States 0000000000

events.title: 4th of July at Lower Deck
events.address: 601 S Harbour Island Blvd suite 110, Tampa
events.description: Join us at Lower Deck to celebrate the Fourth of July with a patriotic twist on our classic Hello Sunset party! Waterfront views, crafted cocktails, and beats by Joe Maz 🎇 Saturday July 4th, 4:00pm - 2:00am 🇺🇸 Click here for table and couch reservations or call 813-390-4017 Learn more on our website www.lowerdecktampa.com 8132513130

events.title: Cookout for Cuba
events.description: Join us for a free cookout with music, games, and crafts starting at 4pm at Al Barnes Park. To learn more about the No War on Cuba campaign, visit https://nowaroncuba.com/. 813-407-3551

events.title: Stars, Stripes, & Science @ MOSI
events.description: Celebrate Independence Day at MOSI’s Stars, Stripes, & Science event! Enjoy live music by Julie Black, interactive science demos like rainbow fire, and liquid nitrogen ice cream. Experience Saunders Planetarium shows, including a 4:30 PM sensory-friendly fireworks display, and purchase ticket upgrades for stunning 360° rooftop views of Tampa's spectacular fireworks. 8139876300

events.title: Florida Wind Band Presents "Celebrate!"
events.description: This July 4th, grab your red, white, and blue and join us for a musical fireworks show, indoors, fully air-conditioned, and with zero actual fireworks (According to the Fire Marshal, we can't light those things indoors!). From the soaring strains of The Star-Spangled Banner and America the Beautiful to the sparkling world premiere of America la Hermosa, our full wind ensemble will take you on a patriotic journey packed with heart, humor, and just the right amount of swagger. Celebrate 250 years of American spirit and the centennial of Palma Ceia Presbyterian Church. Hum along, clap along, and revel in (813) 974-2311

events.title: Bodega Bloodbath II
events.description: Final edition of a DIY concert series held in a family owned Mexican bodega. Featuring punk and metal acts from different niches. Put on by Tampa Nu-Metal band Bad Future and the owner of the restaurant, Erik Mendez Alonso. Food, music and vendors. This year’s lineup includes Bad Future, Wacken Open Air finalists Ramtha, Million and Meatwound, all from Tampa. As well as Round Eye from Shanghai, China and No Fraud from Venice, FL. (813) 523-0307

events.title: Sunsets and Sparkles Above the Shore: Celebrate America’s 250th Birthday with us!
events.venue: Hyatt Regency Clearwater Beach Resort & Spa
events.description: Celebrate America's 250th Birthday from the best views on Clearwater Beach! Join us on the 16th Floor Sky Terrace at Hyatt Regency Clearwater Beach Resort & Suites for an unforgettable Fourth of July evening featuring coastal views, a BBQ-inspired buffet, live DJ entertainment, specialty cocktails, sweet treats, photo moments, surprise experiences, and patriotic takeaways — all leading up to a front-row seat for the fireworks finale over the Gulf at 9:15pm. Your ticket includes: event admission, premium firework viewing, a welcome beverage, a BBQ-inspired buffet, live DJ entertainment, surprise-and-delight moments, sweet treats, and photo opportunities. +1 800 233 1234

events.title: July 4 Beer & Metal: Iron Buddha | Burned at the Stake | The Path Of Increased Indifference | Send All
events.description: Beer and Metal 2026 is upon us and this bill is going to be hotter than florida summer.  Come see why Creative Loafing readers nominated our Beer and Metal party in last year's Best of the Bay! Iron Buddha will be joining us from South Florida for this one.  This is a sludge metal band that you will not want to miss.  Burned at the Stake will be making the trip up from southwest florida. Black metal hellscape fronted by Rev. Andy Howl.  The Path Of Increased Indifference, Send All, vendors, guest breweries on tap & Saucin Wings serving food! (727) 379-4677

events.title: Acoustic Thunder
events.description: Acoustic Thunder - Is a high energy band that is great for dancing and having a great time. They have no set list and play all requests! 941-251-3930

events.title: 4th of July Party Tampa | Live Reggae Concert, Food & Drinks at Jerk Hut
events.venue: Jerk Hut Island Grille & Beach Club
events.description: Tampa's July 4th Party! Live reggae by Jah Movement, Freedom Punch specials, Jamaican food & nonstop vibes. Get ready for an unforgettable Independence Day celebration where American pride meets Caribbean vibes! (813) 966-0818

events.title: Ceramics Continued Study
events.description: Ceramics Continued Study is a space for students to enhance their learning experience with instructor assistance and guiding knowledge. Sign up for a single class to continue working and add the finishing touches on projects you’ve started in one of our other classes. Sign up for multiple classes to choose your own adventure in hand-building or wheel thrown ceramics. Work with your instructor to plan out your projects and make them a reality. Some experience with clay is recommended. 18+ Beginner-Intermediate *Firing costs, essential tools, and glazes included. Clay available for purchase separately in studio. 8132748130

events.title: Ceramics Continued Study
events.description: Ceramics Continued Study is a space for students to enhance their learning experience with instructor assistance and guiding knowledge. Sign up for a single class to continue working and add the finishing touches on projects you’ve started in one of our other classes. Sign up for multiple classes to choose your own adventure in hand-building or wheel thrown ceramics. Work with your instructor to plan out your projects and make them a reality. Some experience with clay is recommended. 18+ Beginner-Intermediate *Firing costs, essential tools, and glazes included. Clay available for purchase separately in studio. 8132748130

events.title: Community Clothing Exchange 2-5pm
events.description: Come trade out your old clothes, shoes, and accessories for some new to you ones! You don’t need to bring things to take things This is a free event All genders and all sizes Alcoholic and NA drinks available to purchase Food truck on site Anything left at the end of the day will be donated to CASA or Out of the Closet (727) 379-4677

events.title: Florida Jazz Express: Fourth of July Big Band Concert
events.description: Get ready to celebrate America through music! Florida Jazz Express is back at the New Tampa Performing Arts Center for this special holiday concert. Enjoy the patriotic songs that symbolize America, Independence Day, and summer traditions in true big-band style. Florida Jazz Express is comprised of the busiest musicians in the state who have performed with some of the world’s top entertainers. 813-239-2750

events.title: Sean Patrick Walsh
events.description: Sean Patrick Walsh may be new to Florida but this seasoned performer is definitely not new to the stage. He was a live music staple at breweries, winery’s, fairs, and weddings in the Midwest. Sean brings with him to the sunshine state an eclectic set list featuring everything from modern hits (Ed Sheeran, Justin Bieber, Dua Lipa, ect…), to classics (The Beatles, Queen, Tom Petty, ect…), old and modern country (Johnny Cash, Luke Combs, Jon Pardi, ect…), plenty of 90s favorites (sublime, Matchbox 20, Blackstreet, ect…), and entire 3 hour set of Irish/Celtic folk at his disposal. He’s guaranteed to 941-251-3930

events.title: St. Peters Ghosts tour
events.description: A 1.3-mile night walk tour of different haunted locations in St. Petersburg (including the Vinoy, pictured). Kids under 10 are free, and kid-free tours often feature a stop or two at a local pub. (727) 894-1052

events.title: First Friday Karaoke
events.description: Join us for a fun-filled evening of singing and laughter at our First Friday Karaoke event at Wild Rover Brewing Company. Grab some liquid courage and get ready to enjoy a night of entertainment with friends and family. Whether you're a seasoned karaoke enthusiast or just looking to have a great time, this event is perfect for everyone. Dust off your vocal cords, pick your favorite songs, and get ready to hit the stage! Unleash your inner diva or rockstar, and let's create unforgettable memories together! (813) 475-5995

events.title: Indie*pendence 5 bbq & block party
events.description: St. Pete’s premier alternative July 4th tradition is back for its 5th Anniversary! We’re taking over Central Avenue with the ultimate Night Market and BBQ blowout. We’ve pooled the best local bbq food truck, vendors, creators, and smokehouse masters for a block party that defines the ST. PETE vibe. (FREE ACCESS): Explore our curated Night Market, grab some legendary BBQ, and vibe to the front-stage Boom Bap sets. Open to the public AT 6PM WITH dj'd and live music!BTHE CONCERT (PAY WHAT YOU WANT FOR TICKET MODEL): Head inside for the main event! 8134214802
